name: Jeb Bush Jr.
subject: It's a no-brainer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend -

I'm sure you're getting swamped with emails right now, but this can't wait. We're just hours away from our crucial End of Month Deadline, and I need you to step up.

**Hillary Clinton is already raising millions barnstorming the country, and you can rest assured, the first thing she 's going to do is compare her fundraising numbers to see how much of a fight she's in for.**

This is the first major fundraising deadline since she's entered the race, and you can do one of two things:
1. **Chip in $25, $10, $5, right now to help us stop her:[RighttoRisePAC.org/Help-Stop-Hillary/](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2484:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)**
2. Close out of this email right now, because you're not committed to stopping Hillary.

To me it's a no-brainer, we have to send Hillary a message that we will not go down without a fight, but we only have a hours left to do that, so you need to step up now.

**The stakes are that high, and if you 're not committed to chipping in $5 to stop her, then you might as well stop reading.**

[**Friend \- below is your supporter box, I want to change those ??? to a YES, but I can only do that if you chip in $5 right now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2485:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
**Friend**
**Committed to Defeating Hillary:**
**???**

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2486:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE).

**[Friend , are you committed to defeating Hillary?](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2487:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)**

Thank you for your continued help,

Jeb. Jr.
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317

Peter, You asked. We answered. After the huge success of our "Day One Supporter" gear, we decided to offer a limited edition T-Shirt for the end of the month! We're a little more than 24 hours into our 72 hour flash sale, so I wanted to make sure you didn't miss this opportunity to get yours.****[_**Donate $20 or more right here and we 'll send you one.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41808062:16795609435:m:1:1349778030:918007D3EE0BD57F1EA6AB83D6BB5201:r)_****_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41808062:16795609435:m:1:1349778030:918007D3EE0BD57F1EA6AB83D6BB5201:r) It's a great way to show your support for our campaign, but we'll retire this design Thursday at midnight and it won't come back. name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: Standing up for a strong America
body:
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

The news every day reminds us that we live in a dangerous world.

Rogue nations like Iran are on the verge of getting nuclear weapons. North Korea and Russia are building up their capabilities, China is expanding its military, and radical Islamic terror organizations like ISIS and al Qaeda are on the march.

It has never been more necessary for America to have the capability, capacity, and will to take on our enemies -- and win. We can and we must.

If I decide to run for President, my main message will be that we must do everything possible to defeat those who want to destroy our nation and the values for which we stand.

**Today, America can and must have -- Security through Strength. That's why I'm counting on your continued support.**

**[Please follow this link to make a contribution before our April 30th deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27444799:26399511846:m:1:877327319:2C69BA29228C61617A51A7FCC21AC7BC:r). **

I'm a conservative leader with a proven record of getting things done, so I have the experience needed to tackle our nation's most pressing issues.

The next President must get our country moving in the right direction and fix what President Obama has broken. We must be a friend to our allies and make clear to our enemies that we will stand up for what is right. America is a force for good in the world and I have never been more convinced that our leadership is needed now.

**[So please let me know that I can count on you by making a generous contribution to Security Through Strength of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27444799:26399511846:m:1:877327319:2C69BA29228C61617A51A7FCC21AC7BC:r)**.

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. Friend, if I decide to run for the Republican nomination for President, I will run to win. That's why I'm asking for your support as I test the waters for a potential candidacy. **[Please send your indispensable contribution of whatever you can afford today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27444799:26399511846:m:1:877327319:2C69BA29228C61617A51A7FCC21AC7BC:r)** Thanks, Lindsey.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27444799:26399511846:m:1:877327319:2C69BA29228C61617A51A7FCC21AC7BC:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/islfTtu1gN).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oslfTtu1gN) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oslfTtu1gN)

name: Lauren
subject: Deadline (Accounting)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[****](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI1NjMzMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQzMDQ4NjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
**
**
****

Peter,
Tomorrow is our monthly fundraising deadline and we wanted to make sure you were aware. [Help us reach our fundraising goals by contributing now.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1NjMzMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQzMDQ4NjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Your support will be used in our fight for a limited federal government that returns power to the taxpayer. It is essential that we have the resources to fight against the liberal elites and their millionaire and billionaire supporters.
[**Stand with us now by making a contribution of $25 or more.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI1NjMzMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQzMDQ4NjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,
Lauren
Our American Reviva**l** __
__
__
__
__
_**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1NjMzMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQzMDQ4NjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**_

** ABOUT OUR AMERICAN REVIVAL**Our American Revival believes that the government closest to the people is the most responsive and accountable to the people. We share the vision of our founders - that the powers of the federal government should be limited to those specified in the Constitution, and that federal overreach infringes on our American freedoms and values.

We will work with citizens and leaders across the country to promote policies that restore power to the states and their people. We will help lead a revival of the values that make our nation great, by highlighting ideas and policies that protect our shared American values while limiting the size and scope of government.[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1NjMzMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQzMDQ4NjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)[MAKE A SECURE CONTRIBUTION >>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1NjMzMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQzMDQ4NjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
**

****
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Our American Revival. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Our American Revival's online community. If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Our American Revival, click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=22563305&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQzMDQ4NjQyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Murphy
subject: Sorry (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Sorry this email is long. But if you support Patrick Murphy, please read the entire thing:Friend -- Sorry this email is long. But if you support Patrick Murphy, please read the entire thing. Here are three reasons so many people believe in Patrick:
1. Patrick will always do what's right for Florida.
2. Patrick is NOT afraid to challenge politicians like Mitch McConnell who put politics above people with frivolous lawsuits.
3. Patrick is a leader Floridians -- and our country -- can be proud of in the Senate.

**But he needs our early support.** The end of month fundraising deadline is just 24 hours away. We've set a big goal of 3,000 online donations endorsing Patrick's candidacy. **Unfortunately, we 're coming up dangerously short.** We'll be blunt: Both the presidency and control of the Senate could depend on the outcome of this race. So meeting our fundraising goal for April is crucial. Your support today matters. **We need to hit 3,000 online donations by tomorrow's fundraising deadline. Can you chip in to help us get there?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Columba Bush
subject: Is your name on the list?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend - Jeb saw Jeb Jr's email below and asked me to put together a list of supporters committed to stopping Hillary before our critical End of Month deadline tomorrow at midnight, and right now, I don't see your name on that list. Please join with my family and commit to stopping Hillary today. We would be so grateful for your help!
**Friend**
**Committed to Defeating Hillary:???
Suggested Contribution: $5**

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2602:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE).

[**I want to add your name to the list before I send it to him, but I 'm sending him the list tonight, so you need to chip in $5 right now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2603:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Thank you for your support,

Columba Bush
Former First Lady of Florida

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush Jr.
Date: April 29, 2015
Subject: It's a no-brainer**

Friend -
I'm sure you're getting swamped with emails right now, but this can't wait. We're just hours away from our crucial End of Month Deadline, and I need you to step up.

**Hillary Clinton is already raising millions barnstorming the country, and you can rest assured, the first thing she 's going to do is compare her fundraising numbers to see how much of a fight she's in for.**

This is the first major fundraising deadline since she's entered the race, and you can do one of two things:
1. **Chip in $25, $10, $5, right now to help us stop her:[RighttoRisePAC.org/Help-Stop-Hillary/](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2604:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)**
2. Close out of this email right now, because you're not committed to stopping Hillary.

To me it's a no-brainer, we have to send Hillary a message that we will not go down without a fight, but we only have a hours left to do that, so you need to step up now.

**The stakes are that high, and if you 're not committed to chipping in $5 to stop her, then you might as well stop reading.**

[**Friend \- below is your supporter box, I want to change those ??? to a YES, but I can only do that if you chip in $5 right now.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2605:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
**Friend**
**Committed to Defeating Hillary:**
**???**

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2606:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE).

**[Friend , are you committed to defeating Hillary?](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2607:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)**

Thank you for your continued help,

Jeb. Jr.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: ACTION ALERT:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| The Florida legislature passed a bill that would require a 24-hour waiting period for abortions.Friend -- **I believe politicians shouldn 't come between a woman and her doctor.** That's why I'm so appalled by what the Florida Legislature did last week -- passing a bill that would require a 24-hour waiting period for women seeking an abortion. This is a blatant attempt to make it more difficult for women to make their own healthcare decisions. Now, this anti-choice bill is heading to Governor Rick Scott, who has already expressed his support, and will likely sign this disastrous bill into law as soon as this week. We have to stop him. **That 's why I'm starting a petition, demanding Rick Scott veto this anti-choice bill immediately. We need 5,000 signatures in the next 24 hours. Will you add your name?** **[Click here to tell Rick Scott:"VETO THIS ANTI-CHOICE BILL TODAY!"](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae27f4/738133e4/39bc1512/7f9bb82e/600510266/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/veto?sc=ema_2015-04-29_b2_pm_v3")** Women should have the right to medical care without Rick Scott or the Florida State Legislature getting involved. This unwarranted attack on women's rights cannot get signed into law. Thanks for taking a stand, Patrick Murphy | **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-april2015?refcode=ema_2015-04-29_b2_pm_v3&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Brynne Craig, Hillary for America
subject: Watch: Hillary's call for reform
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Watch this: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI1NjY5NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQzMDg1MjgyS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

Earlier today, Hillary spoke at Columbia University, where she laid out her vision for criminal justice reform.

She said it best: "It's time to end the era of mass incarceration."

It's a powerful speech -- really something you should see for yourself and pass along to others.

**[Watch the video or read the transcript](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1NjY5NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQzMDg1MjgyS0&mt=1&rt=0):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI1NjY5NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQzMDg1MjgyS0&mt=1&rt=0) | | | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI1NjY5NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQzMDg1MjgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

---
**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/columbia-speech](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1NjY5NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQzMDg1MjgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
Thanks,

Brynne

Brynne Craig
Deputy National Political Director
Hillary for America

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1NjY5NjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQzMDg1MjgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Solidarity with the People of Baltimore: A Time For Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
Friends,

Our thoughts and prayers have been with the people of Baltimore during these painful times. We stand with them in our national quest for better understanding, justice, non-violent action, and peace. I have always believed that the health of our entire State of Maryland depends on the health of each part of our state, and we must do all we can to immediately help our brothers and sisters in the great City of Baltimore during this difficult time. Beyond that, we must understand that the tragic circumstances behind the death of Freddie Gray, and similar tragedies around our nation, demand an urgent, comprehensive response at all levels of government and society.

The Baltimore community is already rallying to provide much needed assistance to families and businesses harmed by the recent turmoil. We can be of immediate help to the people of Baltimore by sending contributions to organizations that are helping those in need. Please help support these organization that have been identified by [the Baltimore Sun](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91e7c/70cc2804/4786fae2/3943f9d/2961755112/VEsH/ "http://www.baltimoresun.com/features/bal-volunteer-donation-opportunities-20150428-story.html"): http://www.baltimoresun.com/features/bal-volunteer-donation-opportunities-20150428-story.html

It is essential that an immediate, thorough, and independent investigation be conducted into the tragic death of Freddie Gray. We must have complete transparency and accountability. Beyond that, the death of Freddie Gray, and other recent tragedies, has shone a spotlight on the need to address chronic underlying problems that require urgent action.

Earlier today [I addressed the need for urgent action](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91e7c/70cc2804/4786fae2/3943f9a/2961755112/VEsE/ "http://thehill.com/video/events/240345-policy-and-poverty-low-income-families-and-children") on a number of these issues at a timely forum entitled "Roadmaps to Opportunity: Federal Policy, Poverty and America's Kids" that was sponsored by the Annie E. Casey Foundation, which is headquartered in Baltimore. These policies include the need to launch a new, 21st Century War on Poverty rather than prosecute the disastrous "War on Drugs" that has resulted in the mass incarceration of millions of Americans for non-violent offenses. The focus on drug criminalization over economic empowerment has had a devastating impact on many neighborhoods. It has also taken a disproportionate toll on minorities in urban areas who have less access to legal help and are more likely to be the target of law enforcement action. It is time we agreed that the serious matter of drug abuse should be treated as a public health issue, not a criminal law enforcement matter. Instead, we should be using our resources and modifying our tax code to encourage more investment and job creation in areas of high, chronic unemployment. We must also implement policies that provide individuals with a living wage. In short, we must adopt an active and comprehensive policy agenda to create an economy that works for everyone.

The people of Baltimore are using this awful tragedy to start a fresh, new conversation about how we move forward to prevent future tragedies and address the underlying conditions that have been ignored for too long. We need to have that conversation as one Maryland, and one nation. And we need to translate that conversation to positive action at every level of our society, from our neighborhoods, to our states, and all across our great country.

Thank you,

Chris

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/unsubscribe](https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/page/m/2de91e7c/70cc2804/4786fae2/3943f9b/2961755112/VEsF/ "https://cvanhollen.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
